CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
SELECT event_id, strftime(event_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z') AS formatted_time FROM events;
SELECT event_id, strftime(event_time, '%Y/%m/%d %H:%M:%S') AS formatted_time FROM events WHERE event_time > timestamptz '1990-01-01 00:00:00 +00:00';
SELECT event_id FROM events WHERE strftime(event_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') = '2020-01-01 00:00:00';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE strftime(event_time, '%Y') = '2000';
SELECT event_id, strftime(event_time, '%I:%M %p') AS time_only FROM events WHERE event_id IN (SELECT event_id FROM events WHERE event_time < timestamptz '2001-01-01 00:00:00 +00:00');

SELECT e1.event_id, strftime(e1.event_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') AS event_date, e2.event_id, strftime(e2.event_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') AS comparison_event_date FROM events e1 JOIN events e2 ON e1.event_id <> e2.event_id WHERE e1.event_time < e2.event_time;
CREATE TABLE timezones (timezone_name TEXT, utc_offset INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO timezones VALUES ('UTC', interval '0 hours'), ('PST', interval '-8 hours');
SELECT e.event_id, strftime(e.event_time + t.utc_offset, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') AS localized_time FROM events e JOIN timezones t ON t.timezone_name = 'PST';
SELECT strftime(e.event_time + INTERVAL '3 hours', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') AS future_time FROM events e WHERE e.event_time < NOW();
